evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: quality tests; clear documentation; SLAs; monitor quality; reliable data
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour dominates: emphasis on quality, documentation, monitoring, and reliability with no velocity signals.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Internal analytics infrastructure with low risk—no financial/compliance/regulatory framing.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Advanced Data Modeling and Architecture; multiple cloud platforms; governance tools
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mid: established infrastructure with named tools and multiple platforms.
evidence.jd_authorship: Model and transform data; Build and optimize ELT pipelines; Advanced Transformations with Python/Spark; query tuning, partitioning, clustering
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Mixed: specific technical details (architecture patterns, Spark, Azure tools) alongside generic supporting language.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data infrastructure supporting downstream analytical teams.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Execution: support-oriented language without strategic direction-setting.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI or AI-assisted work expected from candidate.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Quality testing mentioned in requirements list without ownership framing.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Monitor datasets, quality, SLAs, and performance; reliable data; governance
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: operational quality and SLA management are concerns but not compliance/risk-driven.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: focus on optimizing existing infrastructure and supporting analytics teams.
evidence.language_gate: English proficiency at B2 level or higher
evidence.work_arrangement: Work Model: Hybrid—2 days onsite, 3 days remote
